headline: Small Cap watch: Lindian's new CFO, Far East Gold retains 51% Woyla interest; 'Spectacular' drill results for St George
summary: The S&P/ASX Small Ordinaries Index (ASX: XSO) closed at 3,331.30, down 85.60 points or 2.51% on Thursday as we launched into the Easter weekend, while remaining up 27.00 points or 0.82% over the past 5 trading days. As the market fluctuates, small-cap companies continue to update the...

headline: Lindian strengthens finance leadership as Kangankunde build gathers pace
summary: Lindian Resources Ltd (ASX:LIN, OTC:LINIF) has bolstered its executive team with the appointment of experienced mining finance leader Derek Bideshi as chief financial officer, as the company moves closer to production at its flagship Kangankunde rare earths project in Malawi. The appointment...
